nasb.text: Then the king took his signet ring from his hand and gave it to Haman, the son of Hammedatha the Agagite, the enemy of the Jews.

esv.text: So the king took his signet ring from his hand and gave it to Haman the Agagite, the son of Hammedatha, the enemy of the Jews.

cnv.text: 於是王從自己的手中取下戒指，交給猶大人的敵人，亞甲族哈米大他的兒子哈曼。

ccb.text: 于是，王摘下手上的戒指，交给犹太人的仇敌——亚甲人哈米大他的儿子哈曼，
